title: Gluten-Free Kiwi Panna Cotta
description: A creamy, sweet kiwi dessert made with coconut cream and panna cotta. Perfect for a warm evening.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine coconut cream, maple syrup, and vanilla extract. Heat over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture is hot but not boiling.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Pour the mixture into small individual serving cups or ramekins.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, sprinkle with pomegranate seeds if using.
